name: subscription-billing-subscription-lifecycle-manager
description: T210 SubscriptionLifecycleManager — ORCHESTRATION archetype. Creates new subscription with SETNX duplicate prevention. Validates plan ACTIVE status. Stores paymentMethodId (vault ref) NEVER paymentMethodToken. trialDays>0→TRIALING, trialDays===0→ACTIVE. DNA-8.

nodes.description: Iron rule validation + DNA compliance check: SETNX duplicate guard, plan ACTIVE status, paymentMethodId vault ref (never token), trialDays branching, DNA-8 store before emit
Retrieve ORCHESTRATION arch pattern + setnx-duplicate-prevention + subscription-lifecycle + vault-ref-not-token + trial-active-branching patterns for T210

Break T210 into: consume SubscribeRequested → SETNX check → validate plan ACTIVE → store paymentMethodId (vault ref) → compute status: trialDays>0→TRIALING else ACTIVE → storeDocument(subscription) → emit SubscriptionActivated or SubscriptionTrialStarted

Generate subscription-lifecycle-manager.service.ts — triggered by SubscribeRequested CloudEvent, SETNX prevents duplicate subscriptions for same tenantId+subscriberId+planId. Validates plan status=ACTIVE before proceeding. Stores paymentMethodId (vault reference) — NEVER paymentMethodToken or raw card data. status = trialDays > 0 ? 'TRIALING' : 'ACTIVE'. DNA-8: storeDocument(subscriptionRecord) BEFORE emitting SubscriptionActivated.
Named check validation: setnx_dedup_guard, plan_active_validated, payment_method_id_not_token, trial_status_branching, store_before_emit
Score generated code 0-100 against T210 iron rules: SETNX guard, plan validation, vault ref only, trial branching, DNA-8 compliance
Route: score >= 85 → n8 promote, score < 85 → n3 iterate
DPO triple: chosen=setnx-guard+vault-ref-only+trial-branching+store-before-emit, rejected=no-dedup-check OR stores-payment-token OR hardcoded-status OR emit-before-store. curriculumTier=2.
